# LAError.Code.userCancel

**Case**

The user tapped the cancel button in the authentication dialog.

## Declaration

```swift
case userCancel
```

## Cancellation

- **LAError.Code.appCancel**: The app canceled authentication.
- **LAError.Code.systemCancel**: The system canceled authentication.
